_comment: Perf baseline for Sonic Terminal. Numbers are sonic's measurements on main as of 2026-05-27, captured by `bash scripts/bench.sh --record`. The CI perf-bench job (see .github/workflows/ci.yml) hard-fails when any metric regresses by more than the threshold below; `bash scripts/bench.sh` locally only prints a warning. Update by re-running with --record after an intentional perf change; commit the diff alongside the change so the regression bar tracks reality.
